name: Swift Table Lamp - 26.5 Inch Height - LIT4286 - Clear - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the swift crystal table lamp. At 26.5 inches, this lamp blends effortless elegance with striking design. Its clear crystal construction captures and reflects light beautifully, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Whether gracing a bedside table or enhancing a living room, this lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any decor. The streamlined design seamlessly complements both contemporary and traditional settings. Designed for those who appreciate subtle elegance, the swift crystal table lamp is more than just a lighting fixture; it is a statement piece that transforms any room into a haven of style. Elevate your interior with this stunning addition that enhances the ambiance while providing functionality and charm.
